nasb.text: In the synagogue there was a man possessed by the spirit of an unclean demon, and he cried out with a loud voice,

esv.text: And in the synagogue there was a man who had the spirit of an unclean demon, and he cried out with a loud voice,

cnv.text: 會堂裡有一個被污鬼附著的人，大聲喊叫：

ccb.text: 在会堂里有一个被污鬼附身的人高声喊叫：

csbs.text: 在会堂里，有一个被污秽的鬼魔之灵附身的人。他大声喊叫：
